channel.title: Definición pod mediante manifiesto :: Site
channel.description: Manifiesto mínimo [dzamo@victus my-codes]$ cat kubernetes/01-pod-minimal.yaml apiVersion: v1 kind: Pod metadata: name: nginx spec: containers: - name: nginx image: nginx:alpine Aplicando manifiesto (crear pod) [dzamo@victus my-codes]$ kubectl apply -f kubernetes/01-pod-minimal.yaml
